content_body:
We thoroughly enjoyed our stay here and look forward to coming back again and staying longer. We drank, played games, ate, and just bonded as family and friends. Thank you so much for allowing us to stay here. The cabin is just breathtaking.

The Dollar Game Continues:
Finding the DOLLAR is just like Campbell's Soup. Mmm mmm good!

Good luck and keep the game going!
title: Just Breathtaking
